name: @teak/root
description: Teak is a streamlined personal knowledge hub designed to help creative minds effortlessly collect, remember, and rediscover their most important ideas and inspirations.
author: praveenjuge <hello@praveenjuge.com>

scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.docker:dev:clean: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:reset: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker volume prune -f && docker system prune -f
